synopsis:
**Kelnacca From the Hit Disney+ Series Debuts!**

Cavan Scott and Marika Cresta bring the action as Wookiee Jedi Kelnacca steps into the pages of his own issue! Delve deep into the history of Kelnacca and the world of the High Republic in this bombastic one-shot! Includes an exclusive interview with Kelnacca actor Joonas Suotamo.
title: The Acolyte: Kelnacca
